operation: First, a 15mm × 6.8mm rectangular sketch is created on the XY workplane, and extruded 3.0mm upward to form the base block. Next, a new workplane is defined 1.5mm offset from the base extrusion's workplane with its origin shifted to (0, -2.0) mm, a 15mm × 3.8mm rectangle is sketched on this new workplane, then extruded 18mm upward to form the upper vertical body. Finally, all edges parallel to the Y axis located on the maximum Z face of the upper body are selected, and a 4mm fillet is applied to these edges to round the top corners.
geometry: The model is made up of a wider lower rectangular prismatic base connected to a narrower, taller rectangular prismatic upper section that is slightly offset toward the rear edge of the base. The two top vertical edges running along the full width of the upper section are rounded with a large constant radius fillet, giving the top of the part a smooth curved profile. The entire component has a uniform cross-section along its width axis.
function: This is an ergonomic actuation component suitable for use as a mechanical keyboard keycap or small control lever grip. It has a low-profile mounting base that fits into corresponding assembly hardware, and a large smooth contact surface optimized for comfortable, reliable finger operation.
